instances.name: oauth-failure-cases
instances.errorMessage: Fatal error for pod "api-service-5cf6764745-p9kfj": container "api-service" image "demo-oauth-flow:latest" — CrashLoopBackOff: back-off 10s restarting failed container=api-service pod=api-service-5cf6764745-p9kfj_dokkimi-b429bc6c-b8d4-441f-9267-2493fa2879aa(c558aefc-4666-4598-a2be-d3048306ad28)

definition.name: oauth-failure-cases
definition.description: Tests how the service handles OAuth provider failures — uses mocks that return errors instead of success responses

items.name: mock-oauth-token-rejected
items.description: Simulates the OAuth provider rejecting an invalid authorization code

mockResponseBody.error_description: The authorization code has expired or is invalid.

items.name: mock-oauth-userinfo-noop
items.description: Userinfo mock that should never be called (token exchange fails first)

tests.name: Token exchange failure returns 500 and creates no user
tests.description: When the OAuth provider rejects the code, our service should fail gracefully without creating a user

steps.name: No user was created in the database

action.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE oauth_id != 'oauth_user_alice'

instances.name: oauth-redirect-flow
instances.errorMessage: Fatal error for pod "api-service-7967679d8d-pw4ll": container "api-service" image "demo-oauth-flow:latest" — CrashLoopBackOff: back-off 10s restarting failed container=api-service pod=api-service-7967679d8d-pw4ll_dokkimi-df25edfd-7030-42c7-bb88-5d78cd40d0dd(f15244ff-8e6a-4b39-b714-361f469f5a00)

definition.name: oauth-redirect-flow
definition.description: Tests every endpoint in the OAuth redirect flow independently — login redirect, callback with mocked token exchange and userinfo, and auth rejection

items.name: mock-oauth-token
items.description: Mocks the OAuth provider's token endpoint — exchanges an authorization code for an access token

items.name: mock-oauth-userinfo
items.description: Mocks the OAuth provider's userinfo endpoint — returns user profile for the access token

tests.name: GET /auth/login redirects to OAuth provider
tests.description: Verifies the redirect URL has the correct client_id, redirect_uri, scope, and response_type

tests.name: GET /auth/callback exchanges code and creates user
tests.description: Simulates the OAuth provider redirecting back with a code. The service exchanges it for a token (mocked), fetches userinfo (mocked), and creates the user in the DB.

steps.name: Verify user was created in database

tests.name: Repeated OAuth login is idempotent
tests.description: Two logins with different authorization codes both hit the OAuth provider (new code = new token exchange), but only one user is created in the DB

steps.name: Second login with a different code
Only one user in the database despite two logins

action.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE oauth_id = 'oauth_user_bob'
